testcase.name: SearchEvents_InvalidParameterEndTime_Failure
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.839 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.searchEvents: Attempting to search events with parameters: {endTime=[not_a_date]} 15:30:53.839 [main] ERROR com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.searchEvents: Invalid search parameters: Invalid type for parameter 'endTime'. Expected: LocalDateTime

testcase.name: CreateEvent_VenueIsUnavailable_Failure
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.840 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.840 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: retrieving production company for event creation 15:30:53.840 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Validating user permissions for event creation. 15:30:53.840 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: User permissions validated successfully. 15:30:53.840 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Attempting to create event: event2 15:30:53.840 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Creating queue for the new event 15:30:53.840 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Verifying venue availability. 15:30:53.840 [main] ERROR com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Failed to create event: Venue is already booked during this time frame! Conflicts with an existing event.

testcase.name: SearchEvents_InvalidParameterPCID_Failure
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.856 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.searchEvents: Attempting to search events with parameters: {productionCompany=[123]} 15:30:53.856 [main] ERROR com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.searchEvents: Invalid search parameters: Invalid type for parameter 'productionCompany'. Expected: String

testcase.name: CreateEvent_InvalidCategory_Failure
testcase.system-out: 15:30:53.857 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.857 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: retrieving production company for event creation 15:30:53.857 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Validating user permissions for event creation. 15:30:53.857 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: User permissions validated successfully. 15:30:53.857 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Attempting to create event: event2 15:30:53.857 [main] ERROR com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Failed to create event: Event category cannot be null or empty. 15:30:53.857 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Session token verified successfully. 15:30:53.857 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: retrieving production company for event creation 15:30:53.857 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Validating user permissions for event creation. 15:30:53.857 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: User permissions validated successfully. 15:30:53.857 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Attempting to create event: event2 15:30:53.857 [main] ERROR com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.EventService -- EventService.createEvent: Failed to create event: Event category cannot be null or empty.

testcase.name: CreateEvent_CompanyNotFound_Failure

testcase.name: ActivateEvent_UserIsNotOwner_Failure

testcase.name: SearchEvents_InvalidParameterPCRatingMoreThanOne_Failure
